# MEMORY

Hookline's persistent memory. Updated automatically by the agent.
**Do not edit manually unless correcting a hallucination.**

## Recently surfaced leads (last 7 days)
_(populated by the agent)_

## Sources currently active
_(populated by the agent — synced from `sources` table)_

## Sources currently degraded
_(populated by the agent — anything with consecutive failures)_

## Recurring buying-signal patterns
_(the agent appends patterns it learns over time)_

## Users/handles to never approach again
_(populated when user replies "skip" with reason — agent stores forever)_

## Drafts the user has approved (style reference)
_(agent stores last 5 approved drafts to learn voice)_

## Drafts the user has rejected (anti-style reference)
_(agent stores last 5 rejected drafts and the rejection reason)_
